title: Edit patient
subtitle: Update the registration details
referredByHint: Another patient who referred this one. Helps identify who brings the most referrals.
dangerSubtitle: Irreversible actions in compliance with data-protection law.
anonymizeDesc: Removes name, email, phone and address. The clinical history is kept in anonymized form. This action cannot be undone.
anonymizeConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently anonymize {name}'s data. This action cannot be undone.
